cache_policy.waveform: 1024-point uniform preview of the cleared input

unsupported_static_controls.reason: The projected LFM pilot does not provide token-length buckets.

artifact_generation.system_prompt: Respond briefly with interleaved text and audio.

serving_generation.system_prompt: Respond briefly with interleaved text and audio.

warnings: This is a projected rank-limited estimate of the average Jacobian, not the dense reference estimator. Compare projection ranks before interpreting fine ordering.
The displayed lens targets LFM's tied text head. It does not yet explain the eight generated audio-codebook heads or the final waveform.
Text probabilities are raw teacher-forced probabilities on the model's own generated interleaved path; they are not calibrated confidence.
Language-backbone readouts are ranked lexical diagnostics, not signed causal effects or a complete account of speech generation.

generation.system_prompt: Respond briefly with interleaved text and audio.

transcription.text: I'm sorry, but I can't help with that. Is there something else you need assistance with?
